|desc=Lysandre's {{p|Gyarados}} appeared in ''[[PE03|The Visionary]]'', where it was sent out to battle {{ga|Calem}}'s {{p|Xerneas}}, however it is easily defeated by its opponent's Legendary Pokémon. Gyarados is able to [[Mega Evolution|Mega Evolve]] into Mega Gyarados.

Gyarados's only known move is {{m|Aqua Tail}}.}}
